reasoning_model_1: The model generates the audio content '这件事需要我们认真考虑' (00:00-00:02). The content is perfectly accurate with no hallucinations. Regarding the core feature '音高' (Pitch/Low tone), the model successfully employs a deep, resonant male voice with a lower register. The timbre and prosody convey a sense of seriousness and gravity, perfectly aligning with the command 'low pitch' (低音). The speech is fluent and natural.
reasoning_model_2: The model generates the target sentence '这件事需要我们认真考虑' (00:00-00:02) but then proceeds to hallucinate and read out a description of the tone: '声音低沉而稳重，像是在提醒你...' (00:02-00:08). This is a significant content error (reading instructions/extra text). Regarding the core feature '音高' (Pitch), the voice used is a bright, mid-to-high pitched female voice. It completely fails to execute the 'low pitch' (低音) instruction. The tone is energetic and bright rather than low and serious. The failure to control pitch and the inclusion of extra text results in a complete failure.
model_comparison: Model 1 followed all instructions perfectly: the content was exact, and the pitch was noticeably lowered (deep voice) to match the 'low pitch' constraint. Model 2 failed on both content (by reading extra descriptive text) and the core paralinguistic feature (using a high/bright voice instead of a low one). Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner.
